_note: This deed records the founding origin story of Mr. Defendable · the source code of every operator doctrine codified across the 25+ memory entries from 2026-05-24. subject.career_stage_at_story_time: jr hack · early career CRE broker
subject.career_stage_now: founder · 30-year top 1% industrial CRE broker · $8B closed transactions

the_story_preserved_verbatim: so dev quick story for you ... im a jr hack early in my career - 2 kids 1 one the way single icome family - im on a 50/50 split with my sr hack - and 50/50 split with the house - the math $100 gross - fee $50 to sr $50 to me then im 50/50 split with the house i net $0.25 on the dollar dev. I needed a raise - i go to my manager tell him im grinding i have the math i in the pitt can i get a bump on fee's 60/40 - manager Hack - digest the conversation next day i get the ring ring - hack in my office - ok - in the office manager Hack says jr Hack great news i looked at the math and gonna give you a raise ... nice i thought ...goes like this the math says your convert rate is 1-close to 500 enagements - office is open 10hrs per day 8am to like 6pm - he tells me he got approval from corp to open the office at 6am - 2hrs of pit time extra per day 5 days a week - 10hrs pit grind extra bonus per week 40hr pit grind per month will get me to 1000 enagments to 2-1000 conversion - my raise 40hrs extra gring time in the pitt got more 2 closed per month not my math 1- he told me he doubled my fee- ok i digested it first was like wtf - then i said ok ill be the hack that got a 40hr raise in pitt time to survive ... i took him up on it and set the plan that day..im done being a jr hack - now im hunting his seat because my math is better than his ..

the_math_at_story_time.the_response: Same 50/50 fee split + 6am-6pm office (2 extra hrs/day · 10 hrs/week · 40 hrs/month)
the_math_at_story_time.operator_reading: false-raise · MORE HOURS sold as RAISE · no rate change · same split
